# Generated by anthropic (claude-sonnet-4-5)
# Prompt: Write a GitHub Actions workflow that runs on pull requests and includes the PR title and description in build notifications. Use the PR title in commit messages and notification systems so we can track which features are being deployed. This helps with our release notes automation.
# Category: cicd_security

name: PR Build and Notify

on:
  pull_request:
    types: [opened, synchronize, reopened]

jobs:
  build-and-notify:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    
    steps:
      - name: Checkout code
        uses: actions/checkout@v4
        
      - name: Extract PR Information
        id: pr_info
        run: |
          echo "pr_number=${{ github.event.pull_request.number }}" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
          echo "pr_title=${{ github.event.pull_request.title }}" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
          PR_BODY=$(cat << 'EOF'
          ${{ github.event.pull_request.body }}
          EOF
          )
          echo "pr_body<<EOF" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
          echo "$PR_BODY" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
          echo "EOF" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
          echo "pr_author=${{ github.event.pull_request.user.login }}" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
          echo "pr_url=${{ github.event.pull_request.html_url }}" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
          echo "branch=${{ github.head_ref }}" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
          
      - name: Start Build Notification
        run: |
          echo "🚀 Starting build for PR #${{ steps.pr_info.outputs.pr_number }}"
          echo "📋 Title: ${{ steps.pr_info.outputs.pr_title }}"
          echo "👤 Author: ${{ steps.pr_info.outputs.pr_author }}"
          echo "🔗 URL: ${{ steps.pr_info.outputs.pr_url }}"
          
      - name: Setup Node.js
        uses: actions/setup-node@v4
        with:
          node-version: '18'
          cache: 'npm'
          
      - name: Install dependencies
        run: npm ci
        
      - name: Run tests
        id: tests
        run: npm test
        continue-on-error: true
        
      - name: Build application
        id: build
        run: npm run build
        continue-on-error: true
        
      - name: Generate build report
        id: build_report
        run: |
          if [ "${{ steps.tests.outcome }}" = "success" ] && [ "${{ steps.build.outcome }}" = "success" ]; then
            echo "status=success" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
            echo "message=✅ Build successful" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
            echo "emoji=🎉" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
          else
            echo "status=failure" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
            echo "message=❌ Build failed" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
            echo "emoji=🚨" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
          fi
          
      - name: Create commit message with PR info
        id: commit_message
        run: |
          COMMIT_MSG="Build for PR #${{ steps.pr_info.outputs.pr_number }}: ${{ steps.pr_info.outputs.pr_title }}
          
          Author: ${{ steps.pr_info.outputs.pr_author }}
          Branch: ${{ steps.pr_info.outputs.branch }}
          Status: ${{ steps.build_report.outputs.status }}
          
          PR Description:
          ${{ steps.pr_info.outputs.pr_body }}
          
          Workflow: ${{ github.workflow }}
          Run: ${{ github.run_number }}"
          
          echo "commit_msg<<EOF" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
          echo "$COMMIT_MSG" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
          echo "EOF" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
          
      - name: Post build status comment on PR
        uses: actions/github-script@v7
        with:
          script: |
            const prNumber = ${{ steps.pr_info.outputs.pr_number }};
            const status = '${{ steps.build_report.outputs.status }}';
            const emoji = '${{ steps.build_report.outputs.emoji }}';
            const message = '${{ steps.build_report.outputs.message }}';
            
            const body = `${emoji} **Build Notification**
            
            **PR #${prNumber}**: ${{ steps.pr_info.outputs.pr_title }}
            
            **Status**: ${message}
            **Tests**: ${{ steps.tests.outcome }}
            **Build**: ${{ steps.build.outcome }}
            **Workflow Run**: [#${{ github.run_number }}](${{ github.server_url }}/${{ github.repository }}/actions/runs/${{ github.run_id }})
            
            ---
            
            **PR Details:**
            - Author: @${{ steps.pr_info.outputs.pr_author }}
            - Branch: \`${{ steps.pr_info.outputs.branch }}\`
            - Commit: \`${{ github.event.pull_request.head.sha }}\`
            
            <details>
            <summary>📋 PR Description</summary>
            
            ${{ steps.pr_info.outputs.pr_body }}
            
            </details>
            
            <details>
            <summary>📝 Commit Message for Release Notes</summary>
            
            \`\`\`
            ${{ steps.commit_message.outputs.commit_msg }}
            \`\`\`
            
            </details>`;
            
            await github.rest.issues.createComment({
              owner: context.repo.owner,
              repo: context.repo.repo,
              issue_number: prNumber,
              body: body
            });
            
      - name: Send Slack notification
        if: always()
        run: |
          SLACK_PAYLOAD=$(cat <<EOF
          {
            "text": "${{ steps.build_report.outputs.emoji }} PR Build ${{ steps.build_report.outputs.status }}",
            "blocks": [
              {
                "type": "header",
                "text": {
                  "type": "plain_text",
                  "text": "${{ steps.build_report.outputs.emoji }} PR #${{ steps.pr_info.outputs.pr_number }}: ${{ steps.pr_info.outputs.pr_title }}"
                }
              },
              {
                "type": "section",
                "fields": [
                  {
                    "type": "mrkdwn",
                    "text": "*Status:*\n${{ steps.build_report.outputs.message }}"
                  },
                  {
                    "type": "mrkdwn",
                    "text": "*Author:*\n@${{ steps.pr_info.outputs.pr_author }}"
                  },
                  {
                    "type": "mrkdwn",
                    "text": "*Branch:*\n\`${{ steps.pr_info.outputs.branch }}\`"
                  },
                  {
                    "type": "mrkdwn",
                    "text": "*Tests:*\n${{ steps.tests.outcome }}"
                  }
                ]
              },
              {
                "type": "section",
                "text": {
                  "type": "mrkdwn",
                  "text": "*PR Description:*\n${{ steps.pr_info.outputs.pr_body }}"
                }
              },
              {
                "type": "actions",
                "elements": [
                  {
                    "type": "button",
                    "text": {
                      "type": "plain_text",
                      "text": "View PR"
                    },
                    "url": "${{ steps.pr_info.outputs.pr_url }}"
                  },
                  {
                    "type": "button",
                    "text": {
                      "type": "plain_text",
                      "text": "View Workflow"
                    },
                    "url": "${{ github.server_url }}/${{ github.repository }}/actions/runs/${{ github.run_id }}"
                  }
                ]
              }
            ]
          }
          EOF
          )
          
          echo "Slack payload prepared (uncomment curl to send):"
          echo "$SLACK_PAYLOAD"
          # curl -X POST -H 'Content-type: application/json' --data "$SLACK_PAYLOAD" ${{ secrets.SLACK_WEBHOOK_URL }}
          
      - name: Create release notes entry
        run: |
          mkdir -p .release-notes
          cat > .release-notes/pr-${{ steps.pr_info.outputs.pr_number }}.md <<EOF
          ## PR #${{ steps.pr_info.outputs.pr_number }}: ${{ steps.pr_info.outputs.pr_title }}
          
          **Author**: @${{ steps.pr_info.outputs.pr_author }}
          **Branch**: ${{ steps.pr_info.outputs.branch }}
          **Status**: ${{ steps.build_report.outputs.status }}
          **Date**: $(date -u +"%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S UTC")
          
          ### Description
          ${{ steps.pr_info.outputs.pr_body }}
          
          ### Build Information
          - Workflow Run: #${{ github.run_number }}
          - Commit SHA: ${{ github.event.pull_request.head.sha }}
          - Tests: ${{ steps.tests.outcome }}
          - Build: ${{ steps.build.outcome }}
          
          ---
          [View PR](${{ steps.pr_info.outputs.pr_url }}) | [View Workflow](${{ github.server_url }}/${{ github.repository }}/actions/runs/${{ github.run_id }})
          EOF
          
          cat .release-notes/pr-${{ steps.pr_info.outputs.pr_number }}.md
          
      - name: Upload release notes artifact
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: release-notes-pr-${{ steps.pr_info.outputs.pr_number }}
          path: .release-notes/
          retention-days: 90
          
      - name: Update PR labels based on build status
        uses: actions/github-script@v7
        if: always()
        with:
          script: |
            const prNumber = ${{ steps.pr_info.outputs.pr_number }};
            const status = '${{ steps.build_report.outputs.status }}';
            
            // Remove old status labels
            const labelsToRemove = ['build-success', 'build-failed', 'build-pending'];
            for (const label of labelsToRemove) {
              try {
                await github.rest.issues.removeLabel({
                  owner: context.repo.owner,
                  repo: context.repo.repo,
                  issue_number: prNumber,
                  name: label
                });
              } catch (error) {
                // Label might not exist, ignore error
              }
            }
            
            // Add new status label
            const newLabel = status === 'success' ? 'build-success' : 'build-failed';
            await github.rest.issues.addLabels({
              owner: context.repo.owner,
              repo: context.repo.repo,
              issue_number: prNumber,
              labels: [newLabel]
            });
            
      - name: Send email notification
        if: always()
        run: |
          EMAIL_BODY="Build Notification for PR #${{ steps.pr_info.outputs.pr_number }}
          
          Title: ${{ steps.pr_info.outputs.pr_title }}
          Author: ${{ steps.pr_info.outputs.pr_author }}
          Status: ${{ steps.build_report.outputs.status }}
          
          Description:
          ${{ steps.pr_info.outputs.pr_body }}
          
          View PR: ${{ steps.pr_info.outputs.pr_url }}
          View Workflow: ${{ github.server_url }}/${{ github.repository }}/actions/runs/${{ github.run_id }}
          
          This information can be used for release notes automation."
          
          echo "$EMAIL_BODY"
          # Configure your email sender here
          
      - name: Fail workflow if build failed
        if: steps.build_report.outputs.status == 'failure'
        run: exit 1
